final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: social-media-content
Asset type: Instagram story photo with hand-drawn annotations
Primary request: Korean cafe aesthetic photo of coffee and desserts with white hand-drawn sketch annotations, Japanese handwritten text, and decorative doodles
Scene/backdrop: cozy Korean-style cafe interior, wooden table surface, soft natural window light, minimalist aesthetic
Subject: iced latte in clear glass with visible layers, croissant or pastry on ceramic plate, small dessert item, arranged flat-lay style
Style/medium: smartphone photography aesthetic, editorial food photography with hand-drawn illustration overlay, sketch-like white line art annotations
Composition/framing: top-down flat lay, smartphone camera perspective, centered arrangement with negative space
Lighting/mood: soft diffused daylight from window, warm and inviting, casual and relaxed atmosphere
Color palette: warm browns (coffee), cream whites, soft pastels, natural wood tones
Materials/textures: glossy glass surface, flaky pastry texture, ceramic matte finish, wooden grain
Text (verbatim): "さわやか" "しっとり" "リラックス" "しあわせすぎる～" "やさしい甘み" "さいこう" "いい時間"
Constraints: must include white thin hand-drawn sketch lines, contour outlines around objects, arrows and dotted lines for eye guidance, steam and sparkle doodles, small emoticons, 70% hiragana and 30% simple kanji in handwritten Japanese style, diary-like casual tone, Instagram story magazine rough note aesthetic, fashionable yet relaxed vibe, leave intentional blank space
Avoid: photorealistic human figures, overly polished digital illustration, cluttered composition, excessive decoration, watermark, 8K, masterpiece, ultra-detailed
